title: SR 13-11: Supervisory Letter SR 13-11 on Filing Procedures for Annual Independent Audits and Reports Required Under Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) Rules  -- May 20, 2013

applicability_raw: to Community Banking Organizations:  This guidance applies to all state member banks with total consolidated assets of $500 million or more.
